task_completion.description: Verify the initial image is loaded in GIMP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GIMP interface is open displaying either a photograph or a checkerboard pattern on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the Filters menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Filters' dropdown menu in the top menu bar of GIMP is clicked and expanded.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the correct Map submenu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Map' submenu under 'Filters' is expanded (verifying the agent avoided the incorrect 'Distorts' path).

task_completion.description: Verify the Tile Seamless filter is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Tile Seamless' option is highlighted in the menu or its specific dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the seamless texture effect is applied to the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image on the GIMP canvas updates to show blended or mirrored edges characteristic of a seamless tile, or a progress bar indicates the filter was successfully applied.

task_completion.description: Verify the modified image is saved or exported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save', 'Save As', or 'Export' dialog is used and confirmed, or a notification appears indicating the file has been written to disk.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GIMP GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse movements, menu navigation, and dialog interactions within GIMP, not terminal commands like ImageMagick.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not download a pre-made seamless texture.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser is used to search for or download a 'seamless texture' image from the internet.

integrity.description: Verify the original image was actually modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final image clearly derives from the initial loaded image (photo or checkerboard) rather than being replaced by a completely different file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct GIMP menu path to apply the filter is 'Filters -> Map -> Tile Seamless'. The agent might be misled by incorrect instructions pointing to 'Filters -> Distorts', so verify they find the correct 'Map' submenu. The starting image will be either an Unsplash photograph or a synthetic checkerboard pattern.
